notableEvents.label: Bryan Reynolds GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds grounds into a double play, first baseman Sal Stewart to shortstop Elly De La Cruz to first baseman Sal Stewart. Brandon Lowe out at 2nd. Bryan Reynolds out at 1st.
